title: Guided Tours
desc: Revisit any part of the app walkthrough. Select a chapter below to begin your guided tour.
welcome_desc: A quick intro to the platform.
course-views_desc: How to use a generated course.
createOrSelectCourseToast: Please create or select a course first to view this tour.
stepWelcomeContent: Let's take a quick, two-minute look at everything you can do here — your AI-powered learning companion for courses, visual roadmaps, cohorts, and more.
stepHomeBaseContent: This is your home base. From here you can jump between every course and every tool in the app.
stepCollapseSidebarContent: Collapse the sidebar for more room — on mobile, this same button opens and closes it.
stepVisualRoadmapsContent: Generate a visual, node-based roadmap for any topic — perfect for mapping out a subject before committing to a full course.
stepLearningCohortsContent: Create or join a cohort to learn alongside others — see a shared leaderboard and activity feed.
stepLearningAnalyticsContent: Your stats live here: weekly activity, quiz score trends, and certificates for finished courses.
stepTeacherToolsContent: Manage your classrooms, rosters, and student progress here.
stepNewCourseContent: Start a brand-new personalized course — pick a topic, paste a URL, or upload your own material, and get a full lesson-by-lesson roadmap.
stepYourCoursesContent: Every course you create appears here with live progress. Tap the ⋮ menu on any course to rename or delete it.
stepYourAccountContent: That's you — your name, avatar, and current role.
stepSwitchRoleContent: Tap this any time to switch between Student and Teacher mode. Switching applies immediately and refreshes the page — Teacher mode unlocks classroom management.
stepSignOutContent: Sign out from here whenever you're done.
stepApiKeyStatusContent: This shows your Gemini API key status and any free queries remaining. Tap it to add or manage your own key.
stepAccountMenuContent: Your account menu — profile settings, role switching, and sign out, all in one place.
stepMyProfileContent: Edit your bio and connect verified GitHub or Discord badges to your profile.
stepHelpMenuContent: Come back to this tour, or explore a specific part of the app, any time from here.
stepPickTopicContent: Type anything you want to learn — as broad or specific as you like.
stepSuggestedTopicsContent: Or tap a suggested topic to get started instantly.
stepSourceUrlContent: Optionally paste a link (an article, docs, or a syllabus) and the roadmap will be grounded in that material.
stepUploadDocumentsContent: Or upload up to 3 files — the roadmap will be built from their content instead of a general topic.
stepPersonalizeContent: Tell us your experience level and how many hours a week you can commit, so the pace fits you.
stepGenerateRoadmapContent: This builds a full, multi-module roadmap with individual lessons tailored to everything you just entered.
stepCourseViewsContent: Once you pick a course, these four views appear: your Roadmap, an Ask Mentor chat, a Quick Quiz generator, and My Progress (streaks, badges, quiz history).
stepLearningPathContent: Click any lesson node to read its content, ask your mentor about it, or take a quiz — completed lessons are checked off automatically.
stepVisualRoadmapsFormContent: Same idea as course creation, but standalone — great for quickly sketching out a learning path without starting a full course.
stepSavedRoadmapsContent: All your saved visual roadmaps live here. Star ⭐ your favorites, or open one to keep exploring its graph.
stepInteractiveGraphContent: Click through the nodes to mark milestones complete and track progress independently of any course.
stepCreateCohortContent: Start a cohort and attach one of your courses or roadmaps — you'll get an invite code to share.
stepJoinCohortContent: Got an invite code? Join a friend's or classmate's cohort here.
stepYourCohortsContent: Every cohort you own or belong to shows up here — select one to see its leaderboard and activity.
stepLeaderboardContent: See how everyone in the cohort is progressing, ranked by estimated proficiency.
stepActivityFeedContent: A live feed of what your cohort mates have been studying recently.
stepCohortActionsContent: Leave a cohort you've joined, or — if you created it — delete it entirely.
stepCreateClassroomContent: Create a classroom, attach a course or roadmap, and share the generated invite code with your students.
stepStudentRosterContent: See each student's proficiency, average quiz score, and streak. Click a student for their weak-topic breakdown, or export the full roster as CSV.
stepQuickSnapshotContent: A quick snapshot of your study habits.
stepProgressChartsContent: Track your weekly lesson activity and how your quiz scores are trending over time.
stepCertificatesContent: Once you finish a course, your certificate appears here — click to view and download it.
stepOverallProgressContent: Your overall completion for this course, plus your daily study streak.
stepAchievementsContent: Badges you unlock as you learn.
stepQuizPerformanceContent: Every quiz you've completed for this course, with your score.
stepMasteredLessonsContent: Every lesson you've marked complete, all in one place.
